creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Just looking for some supposedly missing files reveals that some of the missing files are in the ports working folder (/usr/ports/graphics/qgis/) ...

: [qgis] find ./ -name v.what.vect.qgm -ls
547294        9 -rw-r--r--    1 root                             wheel                                 883 Aug 18 14:31 ./work/QGIS-final-2_18_12/src/plugins/grass/modules/v.what.vect.qgm
: [qgis] find ./ -name qgis.v.upgrade.py -ls
605183        9 -rw-r--r--    1 root                             wheel                                2606 Nov 19 10:28 ./work/QGIS-final-2_18_12/src/plugins/grass/scripts/qgis.v.upgrade.py

... but libqgisgrass7.so not:

: [qgis] find ./ -name libqgisgrass7.so -ls
: [qgis]
